_comment: memShare Mailbox Watcher configuration. Place this file anywhere and pass via --config flag.

openclaw_wecom._comment: WeChat Work notification via OpenClaw relay. Watcher writes a request message to OpenClaw's mailbox, and OpenClaw forwards it to the user via its built-in WeChat Work app.

pigeon._comment: [DEPRECATED] Fly Pigeon (WeChat Work) notification. Use openclaw_wecom instead.
